decisions.briefing: Markets nudged higher today with NASDAQ +0.4% and S&P 500 +0.3% in a neutral session. All three portfolio positions — META, COIN, and MSTR — carry score-95 momentum signals with RSI in the bullish 55–70 zone, and each is showing unrealized gains. With the portfolio already at the 3-position maximum and cash reserved for opportunities, the best move is to hold and let momentum work.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities posted modest gains on Thursday as tech-heavy names led a cautious recovery, with the NASDAQ edging up 0.4% amid stabilizing sentiment around tariff negotiations and resilient earnings expectations. Crypto-linked equities like Coinbase and MicroStrategy outperformed as Bitcoin held above key support levels, drawing risk appetite back into speculative growth names. Broader sentiment remained neutral, with investors balancing optimism around AI infrastructure spending against lingering macro uncertainty.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市週四小幅走高，科技重倉股引領謹慎反彈，納指上漲0.4%，市場情緒因關稅談判趨於穩定及企業盈利預期韌性而有所改善。加密貨幣相關股票如Coinbase及MicroStrategy表現突出，比特幣守穩關鍵支撐位，帶動風險偏好回流投機成長股。整體市場情緒維持中性，投資者在人工智能基礎設施支出的樂觀預期與持續的宏觀不確定性之間尋求平衡。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing means buying stocks that are already trending upward, based on the idea that assets moving higher tend to keep moving higher in the short term. Indicators like RSI in the 55–70 range and a rising MACD histogram confirm that buying pressure is building without the stock being dangerously overbought. Today all three portfolio holdings show exactly this pattern, which is why holding — rather than selling — is the disciplined call.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動量投資是指買入已呈上升趨勢的股票，其理論依據在於短期內上漲的資產往往會持續走高。RSI處於55至70區間及MACD柱狀圖上升，代表買盤持續累積，而股票尚未進入危險的超買區域。今日投資組合中的三檔持股均呈現此形態，因此持倉不動、順勢而為才是紀律性的正確選擇。
